name: ghduty
description: GitHub duty — automated agent whose core job is to automate your pending tasks: everything assigned to you (self-assigned included) becomes a /ticket queued for /drive in the target repo's clone. Alongside that it replies to every mention and runs /code-review on every review request. Queue comes from durable GitHub state (assigned + mentioned + review-requested, all open) across all repos, handled in parallel, optional Slack notify on tickets created. Idempotent (reply signature for mentions/reviews, existing ticket for assigned). Built to run on a schedule.
